# PR Notice

> [!IMPORTANT]
>
> - Please write a concise human-reviewed summary
> - Team feature work should target `develop`
> - Do not open daily feature PRs against `main`

## Description

Briefly describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / performance
- [ ] Documentation

## Target Branch Check

- [ ] This PR targets `develop`
- [ ] If this PR targets `main`, it is only for upstream sync or branch-management work

## Related Work

- Related issue / task:

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed the changes before submitting
- [ ] I understand how the change works and what it may affect
- [ ] I kept the scope focused on the current task
- [ ] I ran local verification or manual checks where needed
- [ ] I did not include secrets or sensitive credentials

## Verification

Add screenshots, logs, or test notes if helpful.
